title: agents.yaml
description: Optional agent manifest. Each entry declares a canonical agent ID, its source directory (containing one AGENT.md.tera), and the per-product render targets. The whole surface is optional: an absent agents.yaml renders nothing. One canonical AGENT.md.tera branches on the `product` Tera variable to emit Codex TOML vs Claude Markdown.

agents.description: List of agent entries, one per managed subagent definition.

id.description: Canonical `<domain>.<name>` identifier (lowercase, hyphenated within each segment, dot-separated).

products.description: Per-product render configuration. Maps a supported product (`codex` / `claude`) to its rendered output path under `build/<product>/`.

name.description: Product-native agent name (typically the rendered filename stem).

render_to.description: Rendered output path under `build/<product>/`, including the rendered filename (e.g. `agents/reviewer-quick.toml`).

path_override.description: Optional override for the product-native source path.
